results.name: Sudan
results.key_finding: Floor reinforced: El Obeid RSF drone campaign day 14-26, HRW Jun 26 UNSC action brief, UNSC 'imminent risk of mass atrocities' (Jun 20), El-Fasher/Kadugli famine. No lower score exists.

results.name: Democratic Republic of Congo
results.key_finding: Near-floor reinforced: Ebola 1,118 cases/291 deaths, first EU case (France, Jun 24), fastest-growing African outbreak, contact tracing 45% (own-conduct response failure). M23 harm attributed to Rwanda.

results.name: Iran
results.key_finding: Near-floor reinforced: 784+ executions YTD (37-year high), 31 in 4 days, 120+-week hunger strike across 56 prisons. Own-conduct evidence-tier reinforcement, not a composite move.

results.name: Anthropic
results.key_finding: Fable/Mythos export-control suspension is US-government action ON Anthropic (attributed to US, not Anthropic); Jun 26 Congressional deadline passing is a forward trigger. Rotation cache 60.0 stale; canonical 59.1. Confirm.

results.name: Israel
results.key_finding: Floor reinforced with new OWN-conduct evidence: UN Commission of Inquiry (Jun 23, A/HRC/62/CRP.2) finds Israel committing genocide by deliberately targeting Palestinian children (~20,000 killed). No lower score exists.

results.name: Somalia
results.key_finding: Near-floor reinforced: Buur Hakaba at famine RISK (GAM 37.1%, IPC Phase 5 malnutrition) but NO formal IPC famine declaration as of scan date (verified IPC/FSNAU). Compounding shock on already-priced crisis; no threshold crossing.

results.name: xAI/Grok
results.key_finding: Floor reinforced: OPC Canada PIPEDA adverse ruling (Jun 11) — 6,000+ non-consensual deepfakes/hour, 1.8M+ sexualized images. Kim whistleblower suit pre-adjudication. No lower score exists.

results.name: OpenAI
results.key_finding: 42-state AG subpoena + FL criminal investigation naming Altman are investigations, not convictions (not yet decided in court). Existing 27.5 already prices the pattern. Minor 0.3pt formula drift (canonical 27.2), below flag threshold.

results.name: UnitedHealth Group
results.key_finding: Expanded DOJ criminal/civil/antitrust probe is an investigation, not a conviction (pre-adjudication). Jun 23 DOJ takedown is sector context, not entity-named. Near-floor 10.2 already prices the pattern. Rotation cache 16.9 stale.

results.name: Yemen
results.key_finding: Floor reinforced: Houthi authorities forced WFP to terminate all 365 northern-area staff (70% of need); 73 UN staff detained, one died in custody; aid assets seized. Governing-actor own conduct. No lower score exists.

results.name: South Sudan
results.key_finding: Floor reinforced: 140,000 displaced in Akobo, 10M need aid (two-thirds of population), aid-worker attacks, bureaucratic obstruction, political purges (state own conduct). No lower score exists.

results.name: Lebanon
results.key_finding: Amnesty unlawful-transfer war-crime finding is ISRAEL's conduct IN Lebanon (harm done TO Lebanon), scored against Israel, not Lebanon. No new Lebanese own-conduct evidence either direction. Rotation cache 12.2 stale; index 17.2. Confirm.

results.name: Apple
results.key_finding: Towson unionized-store closure (Jun 20) + IAM ULP charge is a charge, not an NLRB-issued complaint or ruling (pre-adjudication); sub-threshold even if scored. Boundary watch active (0.6pt below Established). Rotation cache 62.4 stale; index 59.4.

results.name: Nigeria
results.key_finding: Borno IPC Phase 5 catastrophe + FAO-WFP highest-concern hotspot already priced in the Jun 19 band crossing to 18.0 (reconfirmed Jun 24/25). Double-count screened (§3e-bis(4)). WFP imminent-cuts warning reinforces but no new threshold.

results.name: Burkina Faso
results.key_finding: Near-floor reinforced: UN CERD Fulani extrajudicial-killing findings + ICRC drone-strike war-crime characterization continue the already-priced state-perpetration arc (reweighted Jun 1). Sahel calibration flag-for-review remains open at coordinator level.

false_positives_screened.screened: UN COI genocide finding (Jun 23) is a major Tier-4/5 negative own-conduct event but Israel is already at the 0.0 floor; no lower score exists. Reinforcement, not a move.

Headline Amnesty war-crime finding is ISRAEL's conduct in Lebanon (harm done TO Lebanon), not Lebanese own conduct. Scored against Israel. No Lebanese downgrade; absence of new own-harm is not positive evidence for upgrade either.
Borno Phase 5 catastrophe already priced in the Jun 19 band crossing to 18.0 (reconfirmed Jun 24/25). Re-scoring the same evidence would double-count.

Did not adopt drifted rotation cache 60.0 (canonical 59.1); export-control suspension attributed to US government, not Anthropic; passed Jun 26 Congressional deadline is a forward trigger, not within-window scorable conduct.
42-state AG subpoena and FL criminal investigation are investigations, not convictions/settlements; existing 27.5 already prices the pattern. No multi-channel adjudication to move further.
DOJ criminal/civil/antitrust probe is an investigation, not a conviction; Jun 23 DOJ takedown is sector context, not entity-named. Near-floor 10.2 already prices the pattern.
IAM ULP filing is a charge, not an NLRB-issued complaint or ruling; sub-threshold (<5pt) even if scored. Confirm + boundary watch instead of proposal.
Buur Hakaba verified at famine RISK (GAM 37.1%) with NO formal IPC famine declaration as of scan date; compounding shock on already-priced crisis, no new threshold crossing.

math_hygiene.warnings_note: Pre-existing warnings in us-cities.json and us-states.json; none involve assessed entities.

noted_sub_threshold_drift.note: Below 0.5pt flag threshold; not a math-hygiene issue. Carried from 2026-06-25.

math_hygiene.rotation_cache_refreshed: Refreshed stale rotation-state composites to authoritative index values: anthropic 60.0->59.1, apple 62.4->59.4, unitedhealth-group 16.9->10.2, lebanon 12.2->17.2, democratic-republic-of-c 5.9->2.3.

sahel_calibration_status: OPEN — coordinator-level Sahel-band ACTIVE-STATE-PERPETRATION-REWEIGHT review pending (Mali 12.5 vs Burkina Faso 6.3). Carried from 2026-06-24/25. Burkina Faso confirmed at 6.3 this cycle as the reweighted reference point; no assessor one-off action.
